LineComment.Text: POSALUX Swiss SA / (C) Copyright 2025
Title: Initialization of axis
Comment/Function:
Author: Fabien WALDT
Engineering: TIA Portal v17
Change log table:
Version | Date | Expert in charge | Changes applied
00.00.01 | 20250509 | WFA | First released version

StructuredText.Text: Reference - Jog Command : Open/Close all Gates

LineComment.Text: Si mode Jog ET Demande reference OU Axe Shuttle selectionné, ouverture SAS Int et Ext
M45: Open all Gates
#tOpenAllGates := #Wait_close_Shutter_before_open AND ("DB_DataFromSafety".ShutterOpened OR NOT "DB_DataFromSafety".EmergencyStop); WFA A mettre en place quand shutter OK
M44: Close all Gates

StructuredText.Text: Close Shutter when all gates are open

LineComment.Text: M45: Open all Gates
M44: Close all Gates
Msg: "700218 - Time out doors SAS int/ext"

StructuredText.Text: Gates management by M Codes - PLC Sequence

LineComment.Text: External Gate
M46: Closing External Gate (Not in ISO Code)
Closure External Gate request from Shuttle 1
Closure External Gate request from Shuttle 2
Closure External Gate request from HMI
M47: Opening External Gate (Not in ISO Code)
Opening External Gate request from Shuttle 1 or 2 (Only one Shuttle sequence is running)
Opening External Gate request from Shuttle 1 and 2 (both Shuttle sequence are running)
Opening External Gate request from HMI
Opening External Gate request from Mode Group
Internal Gate
M48: Closing Internal Gate (Not in ISO Code)
Closure Internal Gate request from Shuttle 1
Closure Internal Gate request from Shuttle 2
Closure External Gate request from HMI
M49: Opening Internal Gate (Not in ISO Code)
Opening Internal Gate request from Shuttle 1 or 2 (Only one Shuttle sequence is running)
Opening Internal Gate request from Shuttle 1 and 2 (both Shuttle sequence are running)
Opening External Gate request from HMI
Opening External Gate request from Mode Group
Msg: "700221 - Time out door ext. SAS closing"
Msg: "700219 - Time out door ext. SAS opening"
Msg: "700222 - Time out door int. SAS closing" (WFA à corriger)
Msg: "700220 - Time out door int. SAS opening" (WFA à corriger)
External Gate Closed
External Gate Open
Internal Gate Closed
Internal Gate Open
